metadata.title: BaseBlocks - Idea to site in minutes
metadata.description: Build, publish, and share internal sites in minutes. BaseBlocks is a collaborative site builder for teams.

landing.heroTitle: Build internal sites your team will actually use
landing.heroSubtitle: An open-source site builder for documentation, knowledge bases, and team portals. Drag, drop, deploy.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't
landing.featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools for building internal sites, without the enterprise complexity.
landing.visualEditorDesc: Drag-and-drop layouts with blocks for headings, text, images, code, and more. No code required.
landing.draftDeployDesc: Edit freely in drafts. Publish when ready. Rollback instantly if something goes wrong.
landing.documentLibrariesDesc: Upload and organize PDFs, images, and files. Full-text search across all your documents.
landing.teamWorkspacesDesc: Multi-tenant architecture with branded subdomains and role-based access control.
landing.customThemesDesc: Accent colors, navigation styles, and layout options. Make every site feel like your own.
landing.openSourceDesc: MIT licensed. Self-host or use our cloud. Fork it, extend it, make it yours.
landing.stepsTitle: From zero to published in three steps
landing.step1Desc: Sign up and name your team. Your workspace is ready in seconds.
landing.step2Desc: Use the visual editor to craft pages with drag-and-drop blocks and layouts.
landing.step3Desc: Publish to your subdomain. Control access with passwords, links, or roles.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Free and open source. No credit card required.
landing.footerTagline: An open-source site builder for documentation, knowledge bases, and team portals.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to your account to continue

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.manageSites: Manage your internal documentation and resources
dashboard.noSitesDescription: Create your first site to get started

sites.title: Sites
sites.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this site? This action cannot be undone.

sidebar.selectPage: Select a page to add components
sidebar.viewOnly: You have view-only access. Contact an admin to request edit permissions.

onboarding.title: Let's get started
onboarding.description: Set up your workspace in a few simple steps

createSite.title: Create new site
createSite.description: Add a new site to your workspace
createSite.slugHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
createSite.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your site

createPage.title: Create new page
createPage.description: Add a new page to your site

editSite.title: Edit Site
editSite.description: Update your site's name, description, and logo
editSite.logoReplaceHint: Upload a replacement or remove the current logo.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.unauthorizedDescription: You don't have permission to access this page.
errors.serverErrorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.siteNotFoundDescription: The site you're looking for doesn't exist.
errors.siteNotPublishedDescription: This site hasn't been published yet.

libraries.title: Libraries
libraries.subtitle: Manage your document libraries and files
libraries.createDescription: Add a new document library to organize your files
libraries.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All documents and folders will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
libraries.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of this library
libraries.noLibrariesDescription: Create your first library to start organizing documents
libraries.noSitesDescription: Create a site first to add libraries

explorer.deleteItemDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}". This action cannot be undone.

inbox.title: Invitations
inbox.invitedYou: invited you to join their organization
inbox.declineDescription: You will not join {organization}. You can be invited again later.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. All your data will be permanently removed.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers.

team.title: Team
team.description: Manage your organization's team members and their access roles
team.noMembersDescription: Invite your first team member to collaborate

roleDescriptions.admin: Full access to edit sites, pages, and manage team
roleDescriptions.editor: Can edit sites, libraries, documents, and publish changes
roleDescriptions.viewer: Read-only access to view sites and pages

invite.title: Invite Team Member
invite.description: Search for users by email or username to invite them to your organization
invite.organizationRequired: This team is not linked to an organization.
invite.userNotFound: User not found. They must have an Entity Auth account first.

actions.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the team?
